mapper.insert:
SELECT USERS_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO USERS ( USER_ID, EMAIL, PASSWORD_HASH, STATUS, NAME, PHONE, ROLE, REG_DT, MOD_DT, PROFILE_FILE_ID ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{status}, #{name}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'USER', SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{profileFileId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
INSERT INTO USER_TECH_STACK ( USER_ID, DTL_CD_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{dtlCdId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, EMAIL, PASSWORD_HASH FROM USERS WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET STATUS = 'DEACTIVATE', MOD_DT = SYSDATE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT u.USER_ID, u.EMAIL, u.NAME, u.PHONE, u.ROLE, u.PROFILE_FILE_ID, ccd.DTL_CD_ID, ccd.DTL_CD_NM, sa.PROVIDER FROM USERS u LEFT JOIN USER_TECH_STACK uts ON uts.USER_ID = u.USER_ID LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE_DTL ccd ON ccd.DTL_CD_ID = uts.DTL_CD_ID LEFT JOIN SOCIAL_ACCOUNTS sa ON sa.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE u.USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT ccd.COM_CD_ID, ccd.DTL_CD_ID, ccd.DTL_CD_NM FROM CMM_CODE_DTL ccd WHERE ccd.COM_CD_ID IN ('TECH_STACK', 'AI_FIELD', 'DESIGN_FIELD', 'MARKETING_FIELD', 'BUSINESS_FIELD')
mapper.update:
UPDATE USERS
NAME = #{name},
PASSWORD_HASH = #{passwordHash},
MOD_DT = SYSDATE
WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SOCIAL_ACCOUNTS ( SOCIAL_ID, USER_ID, PROVIDER, PROVIDER_USER_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( SOCIAL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{provider}, #{providerUserId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(1) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM SOCIAL_ACCOUNTS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
